title: Fields, Negotiation, Compression, Validators, and Caching · TypeScript Build Room
summary: A backend pairing room predicts runtime, request, middleware, dependency, response, and cleanup transitions before assembling the first representation selection, compression, and cache contract for fields, negotiation, compression, validators, and caching. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of representation selection, compression, and cache contract while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal…
objectives: Handle case-insensitive names, repeated lines, list grammar, whitespace, forbidden hop-by-hop fields, header size, and Node joining behavior by field semantics.
Validate Content-Type parameters and select an acceptable representation with quality, specificity, fallback, and 406 or 415 behavior.
Negotiate content coding, emit correct Vary, bound decoded size, avoid secret-dependent compression, and preserve streaming backpressure.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Commit to the mission model · Workshop Field Multivalue Parsing
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop team handles case 2592 in a accessible status API serving assistive and low-bandwidth clients. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to keep negotiation, validators, compression variance, and privacy decisions separate; survive a dependency slowdown without queue growth; then change the method and preserve both status and durable-effect evidence. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Handle case-insensitive names, repeated lines, list grammar, whitespace, forbidden hop-by-hop fields, header size, and Node joining behavior by field semantics.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Node and Express server Commit to the mission model · Workshop Field Multivalue Parsing.
